differential_diagnoses: Kaposi’s varicelliform eruption (superimposed on erythrodermic lymphoma)
Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS)
next_steps: Excisional lymph node biopsy for architectural assessment, immunophenotyping, and TCR gene rearrangement studies
Peripheral blood flow cytometry and smear review for abnormal lymphocytes (Sézary or flower cells)
CT-guided core needle or surgical biopsy of the pulmonary mass
Bone marrow biopsy and aspirate with cytogenetics
Repeat skin biopsy with T-cell receptor gene rearrangement analysis if initial specimens were insufficient
